summary: Full backend + frontend testing of UbukweHub wedding planning platform. All 20 backend tests pass. All UI pages functional. One design/RBAC issue on Reports page for staff role.

minor.issue: Transaction model uses field name 'type' not 'transaction_type'. Fixed in test file.

integration_issues.issue: Reports page calls adminAPI.stats() which requires admin role. Staff users get 0 for all stats cards (Total Events, Inventory Items, Transactions, Total Users). Should either use non-admin endpoints or gracefully show staff-accessible data only.

issues: Button click via Playwright force=True doesn't submit form; need to use Enter key or form submit. Login via Enter key works correctly. Not a user-facing issue but worth investigating if button click has hidden overlay.

action_items: Fix Reports page to not require admin role for stats - use separate endpoints or aggregate non-admin data so staff users see actual stats instead of 0s
critical_code_review_comments: Reports page (ReportsPage.jsx) uses adminAPI.stats() which requires admin role - staff see all 0 stats. Should use individual API endpoints (inventory/stats, events list count, transactions count) that are accessible to staff
Login button may have z-index/overlay issue preventing Playwright click but Enter key works - minor UX consideration

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages functional, minor Reports stats issue for staff role)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ inventory item and 1 TEST_ event during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested: staff login (JWT), admin MFA (TOTP + email OTP), dashboard, events, inventory, transactions, staff, vendors, AI assistant, reports, admin console, settings, language toggle. Backend 20/20 tests pass. Only issue: Reports page shows 0 stats for non-admin users because it calls /api/admin/stats. Mocked: email OTP returns code in response body directly.
mocked_apis: Email OTP sending is MOCKED - otp_code returned directly in API response for demo purposes
